title: Tibni #8402
definition:
Tibni = "intelligent"

 1) contender for the throne of the northern kingdom of Israel after
    the death of Zimri; fought for 4 years with the rival faction whose
    leader was Omri; died after 4 years leaving the throne to Omri
nasbUsage:
